overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene set in a lush Victorian-style greenhouse conservatory with iron and glass architecture. The stationary camera captures natural light filtering through the glass roof onto dense vegetation and planting tables, as a small cat and a woman in period clothing move through the space.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a static view of a Victorian greenhouse conservatory with iron framework and glass panels. Natural light filters through the roof onto stone pathways and wooden planting tables surrounded by dense vegetation. At approximately 7 seconds, a small white cat runs across the central planting table, providing the only motion in the otherwise still scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: Victorian greenhouse conservatory with central planting tables

segments.scene_description: The scene continues in the same greenhouse location with the camera still fixed. The white cat has exited the frame. At 16 seconds, a woman wearing a green Victorian dress and hat enters from the left and walks across the stone pathway toward the center of the conservatory, passing the planting tables. The seated figure remains visible in the background left throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a serene, static view of a Victorian greenhouse conservatory that transitions from a moment of animal play to a poised human presence. It begins with natural light filtering through the iron and glass roof onto stone pathways and wooden planting tables nestled among dense vegetation. As the stillness of the environment settles, a small white cat suddenly darts across the central planting table before disappearing from view. The scene then shifts in focus as a woman in a green Victorian dress and hat enters from the left, walking gracefully across the stone path toward the center of the conservatory. She passes the lush greenery while a seated figure remains visible in the background, completing the quiet progression of life through the sunlit space.
